title: Canon Batch (glossary-pass return contract)
description: The real return contract of a codex glossary-pass batch call (agent(glossaryPrompt(batch), {agentType:'codex:codex-rescue', effort:'high', schema: CANON_BATCH_SCHEMA})). A discriminated union over each item's own 'disposition' field: 'accepted' items are ready to merge into canon.json's entries{} map (the full canon-entry.schema.json shape); 'review_queue' items are not yet resolved and only need a note explaining why. The merge step routes on 'disposition' directly, never infers routing from basis/confidence after the fact. The established->URI constraint on the ACCEPTED branch is inlined here (rather than $ref'd to canon-entry.schema.json) so this file validates standalone under a hand-rolled or relative-$ref-less resolver; keep the two constraints in sync if canon-entry.schema.json's own conditional ever changes.

oneOf.title: ACCEPTED
oneOf.description: A resolved canon entry, ready to merge into canon.json's entries{} map -- the full canon-entry.schema.json shape.

category.description: Optional, OPEN-vocabulary per-project entity category -- see canon-entry.schema.json's own 'category' field. Kept in sync here so an accepted batch item carrying it is not rejected at intake (this branch is additionalProperties:false).

oneOf.title: QUEUED
oneOf.description: A not-yet-resolved candidate routed to canon.json's review_queue[] -- canonical_target_form/basis/source/confidence are all optional/absent, but note is mandatory and must explain why it's queued (e.g. a SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE: prefix or a dispute reason).
